title: Season comparison tool goes beyond spec
evidence: src/soccer/mcp.clj:106 season_summary tool and src/soccer/queries.clj:174 season-summary fn compare multiple seasons — not explicitly required but adds value

title: Demo mode provides sample query walkthrough
evidence: src/soccer/main.clj:23 run-demo fn exercises 9 sample queries with formatted output via --demo flag
suggestion: No action needed; helpful for manual verification

title: Canonical source selection deduplicates overlapping datasets
evidence: src/soccer/data.clj:244 source-priority map and src/soccer/data.clj:252 select-canonical fn ensure each (competition, season) uses only one source file
suggestion: No action needed; good data engineering practice
